name: stETH Agent Treasury
description: Autonomous AI agent with a yield-bearing operating budget backed by Lido staked ETH. The agent can only spend accrued staking yield — principal is structurally inaccessible at the contract level.
author: SenorCodigo69

yield_monitoring.description: Monitors stETH staking yield accrual via wstETH exchange rate

yield_withdrawal.description: Withdraws accrued staking yield to whitelisted recipients
constraints: Can only withdraw yield — principal is inaccessible
Recipient must be whitelisted by owner
Amount must not exceed per-transaction cap
Must wait for cooldown period between withdrawals

treasury_reporting.description: Reports treasury status including principal, current value, available yield, and spending history

safety_rails.principal_protection: Agent cannot access deposited principal — enforced by on-chain invariant assert(currentValueStETH() >= principalStETH)
safety_rails.recipient_whitelist: Agent can only send funds to owner-approved addresses
safety_rails.per_tx_cap: Maximum stETH withdrawable per transaction (configurable by owner)
safety_rails.cooldown: Minimum time between agent withdrawals (configurable by owner)
safety_rails.owner_override: Owner can withdraw all funds (principal + yield) at any time
safety_rails.fail_safe: If yield is 0, agent simply cannot withdraw — no fallback paths

dependencies.wstETH: Wrapped stETH (non-rebasing, used internally for accounting)

decision_loop.observe: Read currentValueStETH() and availableYield() from contract
decision_loop.analyze: Compare yield against spending needs, check cooldown and cap constraints
decision_loop.decide: Determine if withdrawal is needed and optimal amount
decision_loop.verify: Confirm transaction success, verify principal invariant holds
